requirements: Merge W2 context-barrel exports, value-codec classifications, durable ownership rows, store evidence, exact package exports, and implementation checks from artifacts/requests/W2 without exposing W2 stores, evaluators, GuestVerification constructors, or protocol assembly internals.
Remove workspaces.WorkspaceId and retain identity.WorkspaceId as the only constructor.
Return SqliteRunResult { readonly changes: number } from TransactionalSqlite.run and compose W2 transaction-scoped Binding/watermark writers with exactly-one-row CAS.

Replace ActorStore and protocol-persistence operational TypeErrors with closed AgentCoreError codes, and preserve operational AgentCoreError failures through dispatcher gates instead of converting them to ordinary authority, lifecycle, revision, or lease rejection outcomes.
Aggregate the W2 changed-source coverage checker; do not replace its exact integer admission with rounded percentages or exclusions.
Replace every principal CommandCaller and LeaseToken holder crossing the W1 protocol boundary with W2 PrincipalRef.
Bind authenticated principal and Actor callers to the target Tenant and retain the complete qualified caller in CommandEnvelope, WriteRecord, and persisted idempotency projections.
Compose tenant.bootstrap with W2 immutable anchor and atomic Tenant-control plan; remove the public authenticatedCaller trust boundary after closed ingress exists.
resolve derives authenticated caller, Binding, target FacetRef, domain, Grant lineage, denies, path epochs, and lifetime from owned state; callers supply none of those inputs.
tier is synchronous over host-issued resolution and only tightens to mediated.
authorizeDirect checks exact current Turn lease, bundled placement, immutable deadline, delivered watermark, active Binding, and input constraints.
authorizeMediated returns opaque current authority evidence for the complete ordered input list.
allowsInterception requires same-domain placement, target opt-in, and contributor authority; release disposes provider/dynamic resources.

requests.requirement: Verify a successful delegate Receipt through W6 and durable W2 authority attenuation before W5 child Run genesis.

requirements: Bind W6 opaque AuthorityAdmissionReference to W2 current authority evidence without copying Grants, Bindings, epochs, or watermark state.
Use W2 PathEpochEvidence as the sole structural path codec in PreparedInvocation and admission checks.

requests.requirement: W7 routing composes through W6 InvocationAdmissionPort and W1 protocol. W7 must not import W2 stores or invent cross-tenant authority; any routed cross-tenant Binding is resolved by the closed W0 composition through W2 authority.
